scenario.name: register-normal
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[service] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:user-[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:user-[call_number]@[local_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:user-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[service] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:user-[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:user-[call_number]@[local_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:user-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication username=demo-user password=demo-password] Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0
